channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This new AI chatbot is your personal present-finding wizard
item.description: Finding the perfect present isn’t always easy—especially if the people in your life are, let’s say, challenging to shop for. And while gift guides can be a great resource for certain purposes, they aren’t exactly catered to your personal needs and the tastes of those around you.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: These are the companies using AI-driven dynamic pricing the most - and the top users probably won't surprise you
item.description: Amazon leads dynamic pricing with 12.6 daily changes, but Best Buy changes its price only 2.6 times per day.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Albania to shut down TikTok for a year over violence, bullying
item.description: Prime Minister Edi Rama, speaking at a meeting with teachers and parents, said TikTok "would be fully closed for all. There will be no TikTok in the Republic of Albania." Rama said the shutdown would begin sometime next year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Amazon and Starbucks workers are on strike. Trump might have something to do with it
item.description: Amazon delivery drivers and Starbucks baristas are on strike in a handful of U.S. cities as they seek to exert pressure on the two major companies to recognize them as unionized employees or to meet demands for an inaugural labor contract.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Popular Microsoft Office rival targets billion user milestone as it brings together office software, PDF editing, and cloud storage
item.description: MobiSystems rebrands OfficeSuite to MobiOffice, unifying productivity tools like MobiDocs and MobiPDF.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: More Galaxy S25 specs leak – and we might know just how thin the S25 Slim version is
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 leaks are continuing apace, and the latest batch includes details of the Slim model.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: FIFA signs Netflix to US broadcast deal for the Women’s World Cup in 2027 and 2031
item.description: The deal announced Friday is the most significant FIFA has signed with a streaming service for a major tournament. The value was not given, though international competitions in women’s soccer have struggled to draw high-value offers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Asus just launched two business monitors with a unique feature I think all display manufacturers should copy
item.description: Asus just launched two business monitors with a unique feature I think all display manufacturers should copy.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Google’s contractors told to evaluate Gemini responses outside their expertise
item.description: Behind the responses from genAI models are testers who evaluate those answers for accuracy, but a report released this week casts doubt on the process.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Repsol se adhiere al Pacto por la IA de la Unión Europea
item.description: Como ya viene siendo costumbre, la inteligencia artificial (IA) no ha dejado de copar titulares recientemente. La puerta abierta por parte de las autoridades europeas de permitir que se entrenen modelos de IA con datos personales sin el consentimiento explícito del propietario ha levantado ampollas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: We called 1-800-ChatGPT to see if OpenAI would ruin Christmas
item.description: OpenAI just launched a way to call ChatGPT over the phone as a means of introducing people to the generative AI service. Users in the U.S. and Canada can call 1-800-CHATGPT (1-800-242-8478) to chat with the service or ask questions for up to 15 minutes for free per month.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Transparency, efficiency, innovation: The digital transformation of policing in Kazakhstan
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Smart policing revolution: How Kazakhstan is setting a global benchmark
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Baby Lizards Hatched at LA Zoo - A Rare Achievement
item.description: Two baby perentie lizards have hatched at the Los Angeles Zoo, marking a first for the institution in breeding this species.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union are on strike for a second day at seven of the company’s delivery hubs just days before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: How 1 man got scammed in seconds using Google
item.description: Scammers have become skilled at creating convincing fake websites that can easily fool unsuspecting users. The CyberGuy offers tips to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: From CAPTCHA to catastrophe: How fake verification pages are spreading malware
item.description: CAPTCHAs, which are used by websites to confirm whether users are people or bots, are harmless, but hackers are using them to infect PCs with malware.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 5 wizardly ways to integrate web apps with Windows
item.description: While Windows is a powerful operating system for productivity, so much of what we do with work these days revolves around the web.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: IT/OT convergence propels zero-trust security efforts
item.description: Zero-trust security is essential to enterprises that are converging operational technology (OT) with IT infrastructure. New research from Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) identified how this convergence influences zero-trust strategy and implementation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 key concepts for Rust beginners
item.description: Few languages are as highly esteemed by developers as Rust, which promises robust memory safety without compromising speed. Rust also has a steep learning curve, though, and some of its programming concepts can feel like a barrier to knowing it well.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies
item.description: The federal government is facing a massive tech talent shortage, particularly as the development and use of AI continues to gain traction. The post The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Schneider Electric shares energy-efficient data center designs
item.description: Schneider Electric has introduced AI-ready data center designs aimed at addressing the energy demands and sustainability challenges brought by artificial intelligence (AI). The new solutions are designed to enhance efficiency, sustainability and scalability for AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 6 sneaky scams that could ruin your holiday season
item.description: Beware of these six sneaky holiday scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives you tips to avoid falling victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
